design_philosophy: Functional beauty, POS-like speed, extreme clarity. The interface must prioritize data density and quick data entry over decorative elements. Pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts, heavily customized Shadcn for logic.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Dense 'Control Room' grids. Maximize screen real estate for fast billing.

surfaces_and_borders.input_style: bg-white border-2 border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 rounded-sm transition-colors
surfaces_and_borders.button_style: rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
surfaces_and_borders.table_header: bg-surface border-y border-border text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted py-3 px-4

components.navigation: Sticky top navigation or slim left sidebar. High contrast bg-primary text-white. Use glassmorphism only if scrolling content underneath, otherwise solid.
components.buttons: Limit use of primary colors to main actions (e.g., 'Generate Invoice', 'Pay'). Secondary actions should be outlined or ghost.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Labels must be bold and concise. Inputs must have clear focus states.
components.badges: Used for order status (Pending, Delivered). Pill-shaped, light background, dark text.
components.data_display: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts for simple bar/line charts of monthly sales. Minimal tooltips.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle background shifts (e.g., hover:bg-surface-hover) and border darken. No extreme scaling.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use skeleton loaders matching exact component dimensions, not generic spinners.

dashboard_texture.description: Subtle geometric pattern for empty states or subtle header backgrounds.

company_logo_placeholder.description: Generic geometric logo for brand placeholder.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements. e.g., data-testid='create-order-button'
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. Never use pure transparent backgrounds for headers.
testing_and_accessibility.keyboard_nav: Crucial for POS speed. Ensure focus rings are highly visible (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-1).

specific_page_instructions.dashboard: Top row: 4 bento cards for Receivables, Payables, Daily Sales, Monthly Sales. Below: Line chart for sales trend, and a dense table for Recent Orders.
specific_page_instructions.order_creation: Split view. Left side: Customer selection and product multi-select/search. Right side: Current order summary with total calculation and primary 'Submit Order' button. Extremely compact.
specific_page_instructions.invoice_view: Clean, printable layout. A4 proportions. Header with company info, customer info. Data table with items, qty, price. Totals at bottom right. Must look good when printed (use @media print utilities).
